Zhang Changpu ејөжҳҢи’І
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Changpu (ејөжҳҢи’І). The mother of Zhong Hui, who adored her. Zhang Changpu was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
